creator: nxiv@my-deja.com
text:
The Tekram DC-390F is not an AMD based SCSI adapter, it's an LSI Logic
53C875 based adapter which uses the ncr driver.

The problem only manifested itself with the Fujitsu drive at the time
the bug report was submitted.  It wouldn't even make it to the
sysinstall menu.  It would hang on the device probe with the error
described.

It does not manifest itself with the latest release.  ALT-F2 shows that
it finds the two MS-DOS partitions on the Fujitsu drive.  It makes it to
the sysinstall menu.

Based on this behavior, I believe it's safe to close this bug report as
being corrected in a later release.
